question: Implement a C++ program to calculate the simple interest given the principal amount, rate of interest, and time period from user input. Display the calculated interest.

errors: The program uses single-letter, non-descriptive variable names (p, r, t, si), significantly reducing code readability.
Lack of comments makes it harder to understand the purpose of different sections or variables, especially for complex logic (though this program is simple).
